nl_query: Which evaluation policies are currently effective for boards that have at least one script with a pending revaluation request, and show the policy scope, deviation threshold, and review requirement.
failed_sql:
SELECT ep.id, ep.course_id, ep.board_id, ep.deviation_threshold, ep.review_required, COUNT(rr.id) AS pending_revaluations
FROM   evaluation_policy ep
JOIN   revaluation_request rr ON rr.board_id = ep.board_id
JOIN   answer_script as ON as.id = rr.script_id
WHERE  as.lifecycle_status = 'ATTEMPTED'
  AND as.scan_status = 'SCANNED'
  AND as.evaluation_status IN ('NOT_ASSIGNED', 'ASSIGNED', 'IN_PROGRESS')
  AND as.block_status IN ('NONE', 'MALPRACTICE')
GROUP BY ep.id, ep.course_id, ep.board_id, ep.deviation_threshold, ep.review_required
HAVING COUNT(rr.id) > 0;
